nasb.text: He does not withdraw His eyes from the righteous; But with kings on the throne He has seated them forever, and they are exalted.

esv.text: He does not withdraw his eyes from the righteous, but with kings on the throne he sets them forever, and they are exalted.

cnv.text: 他的眼目時常看顧義人， 他使他們與君王同坐寶座， 他們永遠被高舉。

ccb.text: 祂时时看顾义人， 使他们与君王同坐宝座， 永远受尊崇。
